_comment: Real Arno-valley (Florence) climate, monthly. Hand-authored from historical Tuscan climate norms as build-time DATA — not runtime LLM output. Probabilities are per-DAY chances (0..1) and sum-aware: 'clear' is the remainder. The weather picker rolls one condition per in-game day, SEEDED off the date so a given playthrough day is reproducible. COZY renders the chosen condition; WeatherEffects applies gameplay consequences. Keyed by real Gregorian month (1=Jan). GameCalendar uses stile fiorentino (civil year starts March) — map month NAME, not index. Signature Florence traits encoded: heavy winter valley/morning fog, dramatic late-summer thunderstorms, dry-ish high summer, wet autumn.

_fields.clearProb: derived = 1 - sum(other probs); listed for readability only
_fields.fogProb: chance of a foggy day. Florence fog is a MORNING/valley thing — WeatherEffects should weight it to dawn hours.
_fields.stormProb: thunderstorm (rain + lightning). COZY particle lightning + WeatherEffects flash.
_fields.snowProb: snow — rare in the valley, only deep winter
_fields.hailProb: rare, tied to violent summer storms
_fields.tempC: typical daytime high/low in Celsius, for flavor/effects tuning

months.name: January
months.note: Coldest month. Thick Arno-valley fog many mornings; occasional dusting of snow.

months.name: February
months.note: Still cold and damp; fog easing, windier as winter breaks.

months.name: March
months.note: Fiorentino new year. Unsettled spring — showers, gusty, first storms.

months.name: April
months.note: Wettest of spring. Frequent showers between bright spells.

months.name: May
months.note: Warming fast; afternoon thunderstorms begin to build.

months.name: June
months.note: Hot and mostly dry, punctuated by sharp evening thunderstorms.

months.name: July
months.note: Peak summer heat, largely clear; violent but brief storms with hail.

months.name: August
months.note: Hot; the most dramatic thunderstorms of the year, often with hail.

months.name: September
months.note: Warm, breaking down — wet spell begins, storms still frequent.

months.name: October
months.note: Wettest month of the year. Game start (1 Ottobre 1299) — grey, rainy, fog returning.

months.name: November
months.note: Cold, wet, foggy. Deep autumn gloom over the Arno.

months.name: December
months.note: Cold and damp; heavy morning valley fog, rare snow.
